fields.label: Rule Name
fields.description: Descriptive name for this notification rule

fields.label: Enabled
fields.description: Enable or disable this notification rule

fields.label: Priority
fields.description: Priority level of notifications generated by this rule

fields.label: Category
fields.options:
Product Update
Inventory Alert
Price Change
Sync Status
Data Quality
Workflow
System
Custom
fields.description: Notification category for grouping and filtering

fields.label: Event Type
fields.options:
Document Created
Document Updated
Document Deleted
Field Changed
Value Threshold
Scheduled
Manual
Custom Hook
fields.description: What event triggers this notification

fields.label: Target DocType
fields.depends_on: eval:['Document Created', 'Document Updated', 'Document Deleted', 'Field Changed', 'Value Threshold'].includes(doc.event_type)
fields.mandatory_depends_on: eval:['Document Created', 'Document Updated', 'Document Deleted', 'Field Changed', 'Value Threshold'].includes(doc.event_type)
fields.description: DocType to monitor for events

fields.label: Watched Field
fields.description: Specific field to watch for changes (comma-separated for multiple)

fields.label: Threshold Field
fields.description: Field to check against threshold

fields.label: Threshold Operator
fields.description: Comparison operator for threshold check

fields.label: Threshold Value
fields.description: Value to compare against

fields.label: Condition Filters
fields.description: JSON filter conditions for when to trigger (Frappe filter format)

fields.label: Custom Condition
fields.description: Python expression that returns True/False. Variables: doc, frappe

fields.label: Schedule Type
fields.options:
Hourly
Daily
Weekly
Monthly
Cron Expression
fields.description: How often to run this scheduled notification

fields.label: Schedule Time
fields.description: Time of day to run the scheduled notification

fields.label: Day of Week
fields.options:
Monday
Tuesday
Wednesday
Thursday
Friday
Saturday
Sunday
fields.description: Day of week for weekly schedule

fields.label: Day of Month
fields.description: Day of month for monthly schedule (1-31)

fields.label: Cron Expression
fields.description: Cron expression for custom schedule (e.g., 0 9 * * MON-FRI)

fields.label: Send to Document Owner
fields.description: Send notification to the owner of the triggering document

fields.label: Send to Assigned Users
fields.description: Send notification to users assigned to the document

fields.label: Recipient Roles
fields.description: Comma-separated list of roles to notify

fields.label: Recipient Users
fields.description: Comma-separated list of user emails to notify

fields.label: External Email Recipients
fields.description: Comma-separated list of external email addresses

fields.label: Send System Notification
fields.description: Show notification in Frappe notification center

fields.label: Send Email
fields.description: Send email notification

fields.label: Publish Realtime Event
fields.description: Publish realtime event for instant UI updates

fields.label: Realtime Event Name
fields.description: Custom event name for realtime publish

fields.label: Subject Template
fields.description: Subject line template. Use Jinja: {{ doc.name }}, {{ doc.field_name }}

fields.label: Message Template
fields.description: Notification message template. Use Jinja syntax for dynamic content.

fields.label: Include Document Link
fields.description: Include a link to the triggering document in the notification

fields.label: Attach Document PDF
fields.description: Attach PDF of the document to email notifications

fields.label: Cooldown (minutes)
fields.description: Minimum minutes between notifications for same document (0 = no limit)

fields.label: Max Daily Notifications
fields.description: Maximum notifications per day for this rule (0 = no limit)

fields.label: Aggregate Notifications
fields.description: Combine multiple triggers into a single digest notification

fields.label: Aggregation Interval (minutes)
fields.description: Time window to aggregate notifications before sending

fields.label: Total Notifications Sent
fields.description: Total number of notifications sent by this rule

fields.label: Last Triggered
fields.description: When this rule was last triggered

fields.label: Sent Today
fields.description: Number of notifications sent today

fields.label: Last Reset Date
fields.description: Date when daily counter was last reset

fields.label: Description
fields.description: Notes about this notification rule
